targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroup(time, '1d') as time, A.INSTANCE_NAME ||' ' || B.TABLESPACE_NAME as db_tbs, B.USE_PRCT
  FROM apm_db_info A, (SELECT DB_ID
                            , TABLESPACE_NAME
                            , ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE) - SUM(FREE_SPACE) )  /1024.0,2) AS USED_SPACE
                            , ROUND(SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0,2) AS FREE_SPACE
                            , ROUND(COALESCE(      
                              ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0 - SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0),2) / CASE WHEN ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2) = 0 THEN NULL 
                                                                                                 ELSE ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2)
                                                                                             END, 0) * 100,2) AS USE_PRCT
                            , DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME ) AS TIME
                         FROM LPSIS1.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO A 
                        WHERE TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%UNDO%'
                          AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%TEMP%'
                          AND A.TIME BETWEEN TO_DATE(replace($__timeFrom(),'T',' '),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(replace($__timeTo(),'T',' '),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
                       GROUP BY DB_ID, TABLESPACE_NAME, DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME)
                       ) B
 WHERE A.DB_ID = B.DB_ID
order by time

SELECT $__timeGroup(time, '1d') as time, A.INSTANCE_NAME ||' ' || B.TABLESPACE_NAME as db_tbs, B.USE_PRCT
  FROM apm_db_info A, (SELECT DB_ID
                            , TABLESPACE_NAME
                            , ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE) - SUM(FREE_SPACE) )  /1024.0,2) AS USED_SPACE
                            , ROUND(SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0,2) AS FREE_SPACE
                            , ROUND(COALESCE(      
                              ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0 - SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0),2) / CASE WHEN ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2) = 0 THEN NULL 
                                                                                                 ELSE ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2)
                                                                                             END, 0) * 100,2) AS USE_PRCT
                            , DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME ) AS TIME
                         FROM LOTTEHRS1.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO A 
                        WHERE TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%UNDO%'
                          AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%TEMP%'
                          AND A.TIME BETWEEN TO_DATE(replace($__timeFrom(),'T',' '),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(replace($__timeTo(),'T',' '),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
                       GROUP BY DB_ID, TABLESPACE_NAME, DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME)
                       ) B
 WHERE A.DB_ID = B.DB_ID
order by time

SELECT $__timeGroup(time, '1d') as time, A.INSTANCE_NAME ||' ' || B.TABLESPACE_NAME as db_tbs, B.USE_PRCT
  FROM apm_db_info A, (SELECT DB_ID
                            , TABLESPACE_NAME
                            , ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE) - SUM(FREE_SPACE) )  /1024.0,2) AS USED_SPACE
                            , ROUND(SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0,2) AS FREE_SPACE
                            , ROUND(COALESCE(      
                              ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0 - SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0),2) / CASE WHEN ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2) = 0 THEN NULL 
                                                                                                 ELSE ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2)
                                                                                             END, 0) * 100,2) AS USE_PRCT
                            , DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME ) AS TIME
                         FROM LOTTDEV.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO A
